name: Merseyside Detectives: The Murders of Ashley and Olivia
original_name: Merseyside Detectives: The Murders of Ashley and Olivia
overview: Liverpool, 2022 - Ashley Dale and nine-year-old Olivia Pratt-Korbel are shot dead at home, victims of feuding gangs. Can the police bring the killers to justice?
